strategy: Hit with Life (+5% incoming); never attack into Death (73% resist).
Don't arrive late — late wizards eat a +100% Curse.

Exploit the minions: on round 2 and every 4 rounds the Balance minion drops a +30% Mass Hex on the boss side (free damage traps for you), and on round 3 and every 5 rounds the Star minion casts Magnify on all wizards — line up your hit right after round 3 to cash in both.
Watch the boss's Mass Infection/Plague (end of round 2 and every 3 rounds) cutting your healing — bring Cleanse Charm or don't lean on heals.
Blade up, wait for the Magnify and Hex traps, then land a big Life hit.
cheatNotes: Late wizards eat a +100% Curse — join on time.
Round 2 and every 4 rounds the Balance minion drops a +30% Mass Hex trap on the boss side — free damage traps, so line up a hit to use them.
End of round 2 and every 3 rounds he casts Mass Infection or Plague, weakening you and cutting healing — bring Cleanse Charm.
Round 3 and every 5 rounds the Star minion casts Magnify on all wizards, boosting your next spell — hit the same round to use it.
